name: Hog Rush
desc: Trample over to a tile with meat on it.

name: HogRush2
desc: Trample over to a tile with meat on it and Cleave all units in your way.

name: Burp
desc: Inflict Rot on a unit and it moves away from you.

name: Burp2
desc: Inflict Rot 2 and Poison 2 on a unit and it moves away from you.

name: Self Harm
desc: Attack yourself with Cleave to gain +2 [img:str].

name: SelfMutilate2
desc: Attack yourself at half damage with Cleave to gain +2 [img:str].

name: Force Feed
desc: Heal an adjacent unit and give that unit +1 [img:con] and -1 [img:spd].

name: Force Feed
desc: Heal a unit within range and give that unit +1 [img:con] and -1 [img:spd].

name: Fartoom!
desc: Lose 25% of your current HP, deal that much damage to adjacent units, and deal Knockback to them.

name: Fartoom2
desc: Lose 25% of your HP, deal that much damage to nearby units, and deal Knockback to them.

name: Mutilate
desc: Attack 3-5 times for 1 damage each. These attacks inflict Bleed.

name: Mutilate2
desc: Attack 3-10 times for 1 damage each. These attacks inflict Bleed.

name: Skull Bash
desc: A range 1 dash attack that inflicts Stun and knockback. Also stuns yourself.

name: SkullBash2
desc: A range 4 dash attack that inflicts Stun and knockback. Has a 50% chance to stun yourself.

name: Shred
desc: Attack five times for 1 damage each. These attacks inflict all status effects your basic attack does.

name: Shred2
desc: Attack five times with damage that scales with [img:str]. These attacks inflict all status effects your basic attack does.

name: Chomp
desc: A melee attack with Life Steal. If used on an ally, gain +1[img:str]. If used on a pickup, gain double that pickup's effects.

name: Chomp2
desc: A wide melee attack with Life Steal. If used on an ally, gain +1[img:str]. If used on a pickup, gain double that pickup's effects.

name: SUCC
desc: Collect a pickup within two tiles of you.

name: Succ2
desc: Collect all pickups within two tiles of you.

name: Consume
desc: Collect all pickups, then become drowsy.

name: Consume2
desc: Collect all pickups, then become drowsy. Gain double the effects of these pickups.

name: Trudge
desc: Move four tiles. Costs less mana the lower your HP is.

name: Trudge2
desc: Trample over four tiles. Costs less mana the lower your HP is.

name: Body Slam
desc: Jump to a tile within range 2. Damage both yourself and units you land on equal to 25% of your current HP.

name: BodySlam2
desc: Jump to a tile within range 2. Damage both yourself and units you land on equal to 25% of your current HP. This attack inflicts Bruise and has a chance to Stun.

name: Blood Magic
desc:
Take 5 damage and gain 5 mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: BloodMagic2
desc:
Take 5 damage and gain 10 mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Smell Blood
desc: Until your next turn, if a unit in your attack range takes physical damage from a source that isn't you, you attack that unit.

name: SmellBlood2
desc:
Until your next turn, if a unit in your attack range takes physical damage from a source that isn't you, you attack that unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Vurp
desc:
Vomit up the last consumable you ate this battle and equip it.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Vurp2
desc:
Vomit up the last consumable you ate this battle and equip it.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Slice and Dice
desc: Dash forward one tile and do a spin attack with Cleave, then repeat twice more.

name: SliceAndDice2
desc: Dash forward one tile and do a spin attack with Cleave, then repeat four more times.

name: Lunch Time
desc: Jump to a food pickup in range 4.

name: LunchTime2
desc: Jump to any food pickup.

name: Tromp
desc: Trample over one tile. If you trample over a unit, you inflict Bruise on that unit and yourself.

name: Tromp
desc: Trample over one tile. If you trample over a unit, you inflict Bruise on that unit.

name: Lighten the Load
desc:
Take 25 damage. You take an extra turn after this one.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

name: LightenTheLoad2
desc:
Take 15 damage. You take an extra turn after this one.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

name: Crushinator
desc: This spell only damages Shield. Cleave and inflict Stun on units with Shield. Deals 3 Knockback to units without Shield.

name: Crushinator2
desc: This spell only damages Shield. Cleave and inflict Stun on units with Shield. Deals 10 Knockback to units without Shield.

name: Cannon Ball!
desc:
Target any tile. At the beginning of your next turn, jump to that tile. If you land on a unit, stun it.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: CannonBall2
desc:
Target any tile. At the beginning of your next turn, jump to that tile. If you land on a unit, damage and stun it.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Monch
desc: A melee attack with lifesteal. This spell does more damage the less health you have.

name: Monch2
desc:
A melee attack with lifesteal. This spell does more damage the less health you have.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Death Wind
desc: Blow wind that inflicts Poison 4 in a cone. The cone is larger the less health you have.

name: DeathWind2
desc:
Blow wind that inflicts Poison 4 in a cone. The cone is larger the less health you have.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Spoil
desc: Turn all food pickups into Rot Flies.

name: Spoil2
desc:
Turn all food pickups into Rot Flies.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Grill
desc: Light a fire under a food pickup on any tile.

name: Grill2
desc: Light a fire under any tile.

name: Roast
desc: Breathe a cone of fire.

name: Roast2
desc: Breathe a larger cone of fire.

name: Bad Gas
desc: Fart on a unit, inflicting Poison 3 and propelling yourself 3 tiles.

name: BadGas2
desc: Fart on a unit, inflicting Poison 3 and propelling yourself ten tiles. Units in your path get trampled over.

name: Purge
desc: Puke on the tile in front of you. You get -1 [img:con] and +2 [img:spd].

name: ButcherPurge2
desc: Puke on a tile in range. You get -1 [img:con] and +2 [img:spd].

name: Binge
desc: Gain -1 [img:spd], +1 [img:con], and +1 [img:str].

name: Binge2
desc: Gain -1 [img:spd], +1 [img:con], +1 [img:str], and heal 4 HP.

name: My Turn!
desc: Steal an allied cat's next turn for yourself.

name: MyTurn2
desc:
Steal an allied cat's next turn for yourself.
[s:.7](This spell costs 1 mana.)[/s]

name: Gib
desc: Attack a unit in melee range. If this kills it, it becomes 3 food pickups.

name: Gib2
desc: Attack a unit in melee range for more damage. If this kills it, it becomes 3 food pickups.

name: Swallow
desc: Eat a unit and take damage equal to that unit's remaining HP. You can't swallow bosses or large units.

name: Swallow2
desc: Eat a unit within range 2 and take damage equal to half of that unit's remaining HP. You can't swallow bosses or large units.

name: Track
desc: Trample one tile toward the nearest food pickup.

name: Track2
desc: Trample two tiles toward the nearest food pickup.

name: Sharpen
desc: Your weapon gains +1 damage for the rest of the battle.

name: Sharpen2
desc: Your weapon gains +1 damage for the rest of the battle and you gain +1 Damage.

name: Fire Fart
desc: Inflict Poison 2 and Burn 2 on a unit in melee range.

name: FireFart2
desc: Inflict Poison 2 and Burn 2 in a small cone.

name: Rough Toss
desc: Throw an adjacent unit to an empty tile, dealing a lot of damage to that unit.

name: RoughToss2
desc: Throw an adjacent unit to another tile (even if it isnt empty), dealing a lot of damage to that unit and whatever it lands on.

name: Bowl
desc: Roll the bowling ball cat. If it hits something, deal 10 damage in a large cone with knockback.

name: Bowl2
desc: Roll the bowling ball cat. If it hits something, deal 15 damage and inflict Bruise in a large cone with knockback.

name: Tainted Offering
desc: Jump to any open tile and fall asleep. While asleep, inflict Rot 1 and Poison 1 on units that contact you.

name: TaintedOffering2
desc: Jump to any open tile and fall asleep. While asleep, inflict Rot 2 and Poison 2 on units that contact you.

name: Delicious Scent
desc: Inflict Attraction on all enemies within range 4.

name: Delicious Scent
desc: Jump to a tile, then inflict Attraction on all enemies within range 4.

name: Cough
desc:
Take 2 damage.
Summon a Rot Fly.

name: Cough2
desc:
Take 2 damage.
Summon a [img:champion] Rot Fly.

name: Reflux
desc: Take 2 damage and gain Burn 2, then fire a projectile that spawns a lava tile at short range.

name: Reflux2
desc: Take 2 damage and gain Burn 2, then fire a projectile that spawns a lava tile at long range.

name: Yawn
desc: You and adjacent units fall asleep

name: Tryptophan2
desc: You and adjacent units fall asleep. You gain all stats up and heal 4.

name: Hook Bind
desc: Melee attack that immobilizes.

name: HookBind2
desc: Melee attack that immobilizes and inflicts Bleed 2.

name: Regurge
desc: Take 2 damage and spawn a food pickup.

name: Regurge2
desc: Take 2 damage and spawn a big food pickup.

name: Grapnel
desc: Lob a hook at an object and pull yourself to it. Trample over tiles in your path.

name: Grapnel2
desc:
Lob a hook at an object and pull yourself to it. Trample over tiles in your path.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Rehook
desc: Refresh your weapon ability.

name: Rehook2
desc: Refresh your weapon and movement action.

name: Contaminate
desc: Collect an adjacent pickup. Instead of that pickup's normal effects, add Poison 1 to your weapon for the rest of the battle.

name: Contaminate2
desc: Collect a pickup in range 5. Instead of that pickup's normal effects, add Poison 1 to your weapon for the rest of the battle.

name: Lodge Hook
desc:
Inflict Bleed 10 on an adjacent unit. You can't use your weapon for the rest of the battle.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: LodgeHook2
desc:
Inflict Bleed 10, Immobilize 2, and Bruise 2 on an adjacent unit. You can't use your weapon for the rest of the battle.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: Butcher
desc: Kill every unit with 3 or less health. They become meat.

name: Butcher2
desc: Kill every unit with 3 or less health. They become meat. Gain 5 health for each unit killed.

name: Chonkwalk
desc: Deal 5 damage to yourself. Refresh your movement action.

name: Chonkwalk2
desc:
Deal 5 damage to yourself. Refresh your movement action.
PASSIVE: You have Trample.
